name: io.github.startreedata/mcp-pinot
title: Apache Pinot MCP Server
description: Explore Apache Pinot through MCP with read-only SQL, typed schema and segment inspection, and preview-first schema and table-config management.

environmentVariables.name: PINOT_CONTROLLER_URL
environmentVariables.description: HTTP(S) endpoint of the Pinot Controller.

environmentVariables.name: PINOT_BROKER_URL
environmentVariables.description: HTTP(S) endpoint of the Pinot Broker.

environmentVariables.name: PINOT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional Pinot bearer token. Overrides username and password when set.

environmentVariables.name: PINOT_USE_MSQE
environmentVariables.description: Whether to enable Pinot multi-stage query engine support.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode: 'stdio' (default, for desktop clients) or 'http'.

environmentVariables.name: AUTH_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: Inbound auth provider for HTTP transport (e.g. 'oauth'); required to bind a non-loopback host.
